subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and beseemeth the most holy and most sanctified Court of the Desired One, through the acceptance of them that have turned towards Him and the turning away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که از اقبال مقبلین و اعراض
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @review of publications, @chastisement and requital, @wisdom [hikmat], @personal instructions
